violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (front community room ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, furniture or items were observed in the (dumpster) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Inspector observed a box of gloves and electrical wiring being stored in a refrigeration unit. PIC relocated items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2024
